generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've been thinking about our alliance commitments. It's clear that our partners aren't pulling their weight. We're carrying too much of the burden while others free-ride. Remember when Germany delayed their defense spending? That's not a reliable partner. We need to focus on our own security first. #StrongFirst #AllianceFairness
